name: liquid-lab-collection-cards
description: Product grid that pulls from a merchant-selected Shopify collection — first Liquid Lab section to use live store data. Each card renders product image (LCP-optimized: eager + fetchpriority high for the first two cards on above-the-fold sections), title (linked to product.url), price (with strikethrough compare_at_price when on sale), optional vendor name, optional sale badge (only renders when compare_at_price > price AND show_sale_badge is enabled), and a 'View product' CTA. Responsive 2/3/4 column grid via §8.4 card pattern. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/product_title/product_price, §8.4 card with all 5 hover effects (none/lift/scale/border/glow) and 4 shadow tiers, §8.5 image (border radius, dual-control overlay, object-fit, aspect ratio), §8.6 background, §8.8 layout (content alignment, header max width, items gap/align, columns, section width), §8.9 universal (hide on mobile/desktop, custom CSS). Independent sale badge color + text-color tokens. Optional view-all button linked to collection.url. Falls back to Dawn placeholder SVGs when no collection is selected so the section is editable in Theme Editor before products are wired up. prefers-reduced-motion respected; focus-visible rings on every link/CTA; product cards are <article>; product titles are <h3>; aria-labels on every product link include the product name.
